blocks.content: The Ice Queen, pondering Jokre's words, bent down slightly to look at him.

blocks.speaker: The Ice Queen
blocks.content: Do you want to become stronger?
Jokre blinked, not understanding the Ice Queen's intention.
In the legend, she was a powerful mage, so much so that even the kingdom couldn't handle her, leading to her exile here.
But survival was his priority now. He couldn't risk angering the Queen with a wrong answer.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: I want to become stronger!
Suddenly, Vivian shouted.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: This fool!

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Was she still not sober?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: He could understand her feelings, though.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: How much frustration had she endured all her life?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: If a god appeared one day and offered to grant a wish, people in their field would forsake wealth and love for magic.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But this wasn't the right time.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: What could they expect from a woman who had frozen everything around her and even herself?

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Maybe the situation felt too unreal.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: Perhaps her theory of life as a play was resurfacing.
Vivian, unaware of Jokre's inner turmoil, looked up at the Ice Queen with desperate eyes.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Teach me, Your Majesty. Teach me magic!
Her suppressed emotions surged, and her drunkenness hit her all at once.
But her mind was clearer than ever.
The Ice Queen raised her hand silently.
The information she had absorbed as Optros was now stored in her current memory.
Having created herself, she accepted the world's rules as pure information and could control them.
The Wave of Law.
A strong wind spread, forming concentric circles in the air.
But Jokre and his friends couldn't feel the wind. They only realized that something within them had changed.
They looked at their hands, trembling in disbelief.
The world they perceived was completely different from a moment ago.

blocks.speaker: The Ice Queen
blocks.content: Is this the law you desired?
Overwhelmed with emotion, Jokre could only nod repeatedly.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: You can't feel or understand it until it happens.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: But you will feel and understand it when it does.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: That is the change brought by the law.

blocks.speaker: Jokre
blocks.content: This is unbelievable. How is this possible?
Jokre clenched his hands.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Today's event was the most significant and perfect twist in his life.
The Next Morning
Shirone and Amy visited the old ruins' prison.
Time had eroded and exposed it, now half above ground.
The history of magic is ancient, but its academic definition is relatively recent. 800 years ago, there was little understanding of omniscience, and primitive magic was prevalent.
At that time, the Holy Order's power was immense, laying the foundation for modern holy magic.
As a result, mages were persecuted.
Abilities not attributed to God were considered demonic, and many mages were abandoned by their families.
They entered the prison where mages were tortured.
Standing before a device that stretched the spine, Shirone shuddered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How could they come up with such a device? It must have been so painful.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Mages had it tough too. Magic isn't something you can do just because you want to. Now it's a blessed talent, but back then, it was practically a curse.
Shirone and Amy exited the underground prison.
As they climbed the stairs to the surface, they saw everyone looking at the sky. A massive storm cloud was rolling in.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is this? It doesn't look like rain.
The wind wasn't strong. Yet the storm cloud approached rapidly, like smoke, covering the sky.
The temperature began to drop sharply.
Even those dressed warmly felt the biting cold, and the tourists' faces showed signs of unease.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What the... Is the weather going crazy?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yeah, it feels like magic.
Thunder rumbled from the Ice Queen's castle. A powerful wave surged, pushing the storm cloud away.
The air folded visibly along the wave.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Watch out!
Shirone stepped in front of Amy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Move!
A woman in a robe stepped in front of Shirone and Amy.
It was Lyria, the mage.
She quickly formed hand signs.
The three basic seals of exorcism—prohibition, reversal, and fragmentation—flowed seamlessly, creating a barrier of law.
As the powerful wave swept over them, a shockwave exploded in front of Lyria.
Ah!
Lyria's body flew back like a cannonball.
The tourists all looked at her. The wave had passed, but only she seemed affected.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What the... What's going on?
Even after hitting the ground, Lyria rolled several times.
Dante appeared, lowering his stance. He caught her precisely in his arms.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Are you okay?
Leaning against Dante, Lyria bit her lip.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: She had performed many exorcisms, but this was the first time encountering a mental entity using such powerful law.
Shirone and Amy saw Dante and ran over.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dante, what's going on?
Dante delayed his answer and helped Lyria up.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: The law, unlike magic, had no physical impact. Whether Shirone and Amy were unharmed was for Lyria to determine.
How did it go? Did you succeed?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: It was close. How about you?
The Wave of Law had spread quickly, and Lyria couldn't protect both locations.
No matter how skilled a mage, without mastering the will of prohibition, reversal, and fragmentation, blocking the law was impossible.
Dante pulled out the totem hanging around his neck.
The pendant, shaped like a monster's face, hung on a necklace made of twisted birch bark.
Though it looked menacing, it was a guardian spirit that repelled evil.
A diagonal crack ran across the guardian spirit's forehead, a scar from exposure to the Wave of Law.
As he placed it in his palm, it finally split in two with a crack.
Dante handed the broken totem to Lyria with an awkward expression.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: You said it was the only one, right? Sorry.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: No need to apologize. That's what totems are for. It means the law was strong enough to split the guardian spirit. It's a relief we blocked it.
Shirone couldn't understand their conversation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dante, what's going on?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: We were lucky. You should be fine.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What do you mean, fine?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: It was already predicted that a self-aware mental entity would change the surrounding law to survive.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: In such a situation, Lyria could only save 2-3 people in an instant.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: There were hundreds of people gathered here.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Among them, there were surely those with the abilities needed for this exorcism.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Was it the right choice?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: She couldn't predict the outcome of saving a couple not even twenty years old while abandoning everyone else.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Dante, who are these kids? I didn't follow your lead to save your friends.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I told you, second place.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Second? What's second?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: He's first. The kingdom's number one.
Lyria looked at Shirone in shock.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Even though he wasn't a professional yet, she had allied with Dante because he was known for his exceptional skills in the kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Sorcerers didn't have a competitive system like mages, so hearing 'second place' didn't impress her much.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: In a kingdom with so many people, what did it matter if someone was first or second?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Second place just meant a very talented student.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: But here they were.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: In this vast kingdom, having the first and second place in one spot was shocking to her.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: Did this kid really beat Dante?

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: He had a kind face. Except for his lively eyes, there was no aura of the nation's top student.
Dante pointed to the Ice Queen's castle.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: She's here. Shirone and Amy, get ready. You might not understand, but stay alert.
A woman in the same dress as the Ice Queen flew across the sky towards them.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Isn't that the Ice Queen?
The Ice Queen descended slowly to the ground.
A flash of light twisted through space and landed beside her.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Jokre? Why are you...?
Jokre sneered and bowed behind the Ice Queen.
Rudvans and Vivian landed next.
No one understood the situation.
At least Shirone and Amy felt a sense of crisis, but the tourists seemed more relaxed, even smiling.

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Haha! It's really the Ice Queen! Is this some event?

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Wow, she looks just like her! How did they find someone so identical among the mages?
It was natural to think it was part of the festival.
Otherwise, how could the Ice Queen be walking around in front of them?
Shirone would have thought it was a performance by the organizers if he hadn't seen the shockwave explode in front of Lyria.
As the Ice Queen stepped towards the crowd, the tourists applauded and cheered.
The winter festival is held every year, but this year's special event was considered innovative even by their standards.
Reviving the legendary Ice Queen was quite an idea.
Even the wax figure of the Ice Queen had garnered numerous fans due to its beauty.
However, the appearance of the woman playing the role was incomparable to the wax figure.
It was the radiant power of life.

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Whew! Ice Queen! Please shake my hand just once!
A chubby man grinned and extended his hand, but the person next to him stopped him as if to say it was inappropriate.

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Hey, that's disrespectful. You might freeze.
People burst into laughter.
No one realized that this was a real situation.
Amidst the jokes, the Ice Queen continued to walk with an indifferent expression.

blocks.speaker: Lyria
blocks.content: What is it? What law did it touch?
The wave of law had altered the laws of everyone except Shirone's party.
Nothing special had happened yet, but considering the power of the wave, the extent of the change would be enormous.
